notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. James Wood out at 2nd. Luis García Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Crews plunked
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews hit by pitch. CJ Abrams scores. José Tena to 3rd. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Padres challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Drew Millas reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. José Tena scores. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd. Dylan Crews to 2nd. Missed catch error by shortstop Xander Bogaerts, assist to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead walks. Jorbit Vivas scores. Dylan Crews to 3rd. Drew Millas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead doubles (9) on a line drive to left fielder Gavin Sheets. Dylan Crews scores. Drew Millas scores.

notableEvents.label: Gavin Sheets GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gavin Sheets grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 2nd. Gavin Sheets out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, third baseman Jorbit Vivas to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Gavin Sheets out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.
